additional_metadata.note: Part of the dbt Global Circuit Series.

events.agenda: Single talk on the latest dbt Labs tools and ideas, followed by networking.
events.event_description: This meetup is designed for builders, thinkers, and tinkerers — folks who want to roll up their sleeves, learn from each other, and imagine what's next for the analytics engineering stack.
events.event_name: dbt World Circuit: Wellington dbt Meetup (hosted at Qrious)
events.location: Qrious (Spark), Level One, 42-52 Willis Street, Wellington
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jul 31, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 7:00 PM NZST

Joel Labes (Senior Developer Experience Advocate, dbt Labs) will dive into the latest tools and ideas we've been shipping — what they unlock, how they fit together, and why we built them the way we did.

talks.description: A dive into the latest dbt Labs tools and ideas, what they unlock, how they fit together, and why they were built the way they were, powered by the dbt Fusion engine.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Joel Labes (Senior Developer Experience Advocate, dbt Labs) will dive into the latest tools and ideas we've been shipping — what they unlock, how they fit together, and why we built them the way we did.
talks.speaker_title: Senior Developer Experience Advocate, dbt Labs
talks.title: The Latest Tools and Ideas from dbt Labs
